title: G4GADGET Whiteboard Markers Bullet Tip 4 Pack – Dry Erase Pens for Whiteboard, 4 Assorted Colours (Black, Blue, Red, Green) – Dry Wipe Markers for School, Office & Classroom Use
features: ✅ 4 Essential Colours – Includes 1x black, 1x blue, 1x red & 1x green dry wipe markers, providing the perfect colour set for everyday use.
✅ Bullet Tip for Clear Writing – Designed with a durable bullet tip that creates bold, consistent lines for notes, diagrams, and presentations. Perfect for both classrooms and office meetings.
✅ Bright & Visible Colours – Strong pigments ensure text and drawings stand out, making it easy to read from a distance on whiteboards, flipcharts, and glass surfaces.
✅ Easy to Erase – Wipes off cleanly without ghosting or residue, keeping your whiteboard surface fresh and ready for reuse.
✅ Perfect for Multiple Uses – Ideal for schools, offices, home organisation, and classroom supplies – reliable markers for daily writing and planning.
